description_long: This bungalow is a modern, sprawling single-story residence surrounded by dense greenery and mature trees, creating a secluded and private atmosphere. The structure features a series of interconnected rectangular volumes with flat and slightly sloped roofs, giving it a contemporary architectural style. Large windows and glass doors are visible throughout, allowing for ample natural light and seamless indoor-outdoor transitions. The property includes a central courtyard with a swimming pool, visible from multiple angles, and several outdoor patios and decks. The main entrance is marked by a prominent walkway and a covered porch area. The exterior is finished in a combination of light and dark neutral tones, with landscaping integrated closely around the building.
description: A modern, single-story bungalow with flat roofs, large windows, and a central pool, surrounded by dense trees and landscaped patios.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entrance, covered porch, and dense tree coverage framing the walkway.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the central pool, outdoor patios, and the interconnected rectangular building volumes.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the expansive backyard, large windows, and additional outdoor living spaces.
description_view_3: Opposite side view with a clear look at the pool, side patios, and the extensive tree line encircling the property.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical with large grouped windows and glass doors
